releaseNotes.releaseNotes:
- Introducing LM Studio's next-gen llama.cpp engine (v2.0.0)
- Support for parallel requests via continuous batching
- Fix for missing logprobs in /v1/responses REST API

- Introducing LM Studio's next-gen llama.cpp engine (v2.0.0)
- Support for parallel requests via continuous batching

- Fixed bug in GLM-4.7-Flash that degraded generation quality
- llama.cpp release b7790 (commit 50b7f076)

- Support for GLM-4.7-Flash
- llama.cpp release b7779 (commit 6df686b)

- Support for OpenResponses features (requires LM Studio 0.3.39)
- Disable direct-io loading to fix model load failures on some systems
- Add support for loading new Qwen3-Next GGUF format
- llama.cpp release b7721 (commit e047f9ee9)

- Support for features in LM Studio 0.3.39 release
- Add support for loading new Qwen3-Next GGUF format
- llama.cpp release b7721 (commit e047f9ee9)

- Add support for loading new Qwen3-Next GGUF format
- llama.cpp release b7721 (commit e047f9ee9)

- [CUDA 12/13] GPU accelerated sampling (requires repeat penalty OFF/1.0 for now)
- [Mac] Fix BF16 model load failures
- llama.cpp release b7636 (commit 1871f0b)

- Revert experimental features released in v1.100.0
- llama.cpp release b7574 (commit 0bd1212)
- llama.cpp release b7574 (commit 0bd1212)

- Fixed bug where LFM2 MoE models did not load
- llama.cpp release b7522 (commit e3b35dd)

- GLM-4V model family vision support
  - Includes GLM-4.6V-Flash, GLM-4.6V
- Qwen3-Next generation speed optimizations
- llama.cpp release b7437 (commit ec98e20)

- NVIDIA Nemotron 3 Nano support
- Fix for gpt-oss quality regression

- Devstral-2 support
- Ministral 3 quality improvements
- [Metal] Improve pre-fill performance of granite4 and other SSM-based models.
- llama.cpp release b7363 (commit 7bed317)

- Devstral-2 support
- Ministral 3 quality improvements
- [Metal] Improve pre-fill performance of granite4 and other SSM-based models.
- llama.cpp release b7358 (commit 1df2e90)

- [Metal] Improve pre-fill performance of granite4 and other SSM-based models.
- RNJ-1 support
- llama.cpp release b7350 (commit 4dff236)

- RNJ-1 support
- llama.cpp release b7336 (commit 02e409a)

- Qwen3-Next optimizations
- Fix llama arch models sometimes generating gibberish
- Fix memory usage growing unbounded when sending many images to VLMs
- llama.cpp release b7285 (commit 8160b38)

- Qwen3-Next support
- llama.cpp release b7142 (commit b61de2b)
- llama.cpp release b7142 (commit b61de2b)

- Fix bug in olmo-3 KV cache re-use
- llama.cpp release b7087 (commit cb623de)
- llama.cpp release b7087 (commit cb623de)

- Fixed Qwen3-VL crash when processing image prompts in v1.57.0
- [CUDA] Fixed bug which did not allow model loading when FA off for certain ctx lengths
- llama.cpp release b7011 (commit 0c74f32)

- [CUDA] Fixed bug which did not allow model loading when FA off for certain ctx lengths
- llama.cpp release b7011 (commit 0c74f32)

- Minimax M2 model support
- Janus Pro w/ image input model support
- [Mac][CUDA] Improved VLM performance for certain models via vision encoder flash attention
  - Includes Gemma 3, Qwen3-VL, and others
- llama.cpp release b6937 (commit e7da30b)

- Qwen3-VL model family support
- LightOnOCR model support
- [Mac] Faster image processing through GPU acceleration
- llama.cpp release b6901 (commit 4146d6a)

- Support for LightOnOCR model
- llama.cpp release b6857 (commit c55d53a)

- GLM 4.6 model support
- Swiss AI Apertus model support
- [Linux][ARM][CUDA] Improved DGX Spark performance
- llama.cpp release b6808 (commit b617cfd)

- [Vulkan] Fix bug where models were not being loaded onto iGPUs
- llama.cpp release b6651 (commit bf6f3b3a)

- xAI Grok 2 support
- [Metal] Fix gibberish output when OOM
- llama.cpp release b6651 (commit bf6f3b3a)

- xAI Grok 2 support
- llama.cpp release b6583 (commit 2705297)

- Fix openai/gpt-oss regression
- Google/EmbeddingGemma support (embedding models based on Gemma3)
- NVIDIA Nemotron-Nano-v2 support
  - Tool calling support requires LM Studio version >= 0.3.25+2
- llama.cpp release b6390 (commit a812838)

- [Rollback] this engine is the same as 1.48.0 due to a gpt-oss regression in 1.50.0
- If you need Google/EmbeddingGemma or NVIDIA Nemotron-Nano-v2, use v1.50.0

- Google/EmbeddingGemma support (embedding models based on Gemma3)
- NVIDIA Nemotron-Nano-v2 support
  - Tool calling support requires LM Studio version >= 0.3.25+2

- Support for ByteDance/Seed-OSS
  - Tool support requires LM Studio version 0.3.24+4
- llama.cpp release b6275 (commit e288693)

- Liquid LFM2-VL support
- llama.cpp release b6191 (commit 618575c)

- OpenAI gpt-oss support (20B, 120B)
  - Requires LM Studio version >= 0.3.21-b4
  - [CUDA][Vulkan] Flash attention performance improvements
- GLM4.5 support
- Intern-S1 support
- llama.cpp release b6133 (commit be48528)

- OpenAI gpt-oss support! (20B, 120B)
  - Requires LM Studio version >= 0.3.21-b4

- GLM-4.1V-9B-Thinking support
- SmallThinker support
- llama.cpp release b6052 (commit daf2dd78)

- Ernie 4.5 MoE support
- EXAONE 4.0 support
- Kimi K2 support
- [Linux][ROCm] Support for Radeon 9000 series GPUs and Ryzen AI PRO 300 series iGPUs

- Kimi K2 support (experimental)
- llama.cpp release b5902 (commit 4a4f426)

- Recurrent and hybrid model architecture support
 - Falcon-H1
 - IBM Granite 4 Tiny Preview
 - RWKV

- SmolLM3 model support (requires LM Studio version >= 0.3.18-b2)

- Improved prompt processing speed when context overflows

- Google Gemma3n support (text-only)
- dots.llm1 model support

- dots.llm1 model support
- Fix occasional speculative decoding generation quality bug
- llama.cpp updated to b5745 (commit bf2a99e)

- Vision model improvements
  - Context overflow support is available for chats with images! This enables "infinitely-long" chats now with images too
  - Image prompt caching support: Massively improve responsiveness in chats with images (TTFT can be 10x+ faster for long chats)
- llama.cpp updated to b5572 (commit 7675c55)

- Llama 4 vision support
- Enable any LLM to be used as an embedding model (requires LM Studio 0.3.16-b6)
- Fixed prompt processing bugs when chats exceed context length

- Llama 4 vision support
- Fix prompt processing bugs when chats exceed context length

- [Mac] Increase generation speed for QwenVL models (up to 1.5x faster) with mRoPE kernel
- llama.cpp updated to b5350 (commit c104023)

result.message: Error trying to query CUDA gpus: No CUDA devices found!

backendCompatibility.message: Backend 'llama.cpp-win-x86_64-nvidia-cuda-avx2' requires gpu acceleration, but GPU survey on hardware was unsuccessful with message 'Error trying to query CUDA gpus: No CUDA devices found!'!
